001.name: bulbasaur
001.structure: quadruped, large bulb on back, wide flat face, stubby legs, broad neckless body, four-toed feet

004.name: charmander
004.structure: small bipedal lizard, large round head, long tail, short arms with claws, digitigrade feet, cream-colored belly

007.name: squirtle
007.structure: small bipedal turtle, large round domed shell, big round head, curled tail, short arms and legs

025.name: pikachu
025.structure: small bipedal mouse, long pointed ears with dark tips, lightning-bolt shaped tail, chubby round face, round body, short limbs

types.name: normal
types.morph_traits: plain fur or smooth skin, no special features, neutral earth tones, simple round shapes

types.name: fire
types.morph_traits: flame-tipped tail and ears, ember scales or magma-cracked skin, orange and red color palette, glowing eyes

types.name: water
types.morph_traits: fins replacing ears and tail tip, smooth wet scales, blue and teal color palette, gill slits on neck

types.name: electric
types.morph_traits: jagged lightning-bolt shaped tail and spines, yellow and white color palette, sparking fur tips, sharp angular features

types.name: grass
types.morph_traits: leaf-shaped ears and tail, vine or petal growths on body, green color palette, floral patterns on skin

types.name: ice
types.morph_traits: crystalline ice spikes on back and tail, pale blue and white color palette, frosted fur, sharp angular icy features

types.name: fighting
types.morph_traits: bulky muscular build, thick limbs, scarred or calloused skin, earthy red and brown tones, determined expression

types.name: poison
types.morph_traits: venomous fangs or stingers, purple and acid-green color palette, toxic slime coating, barbed tail

types.name: ground
types.morph_traits: rocky plated hide, sandy brown color palette, clawed flat feet, earthen crystal growths, heavy stocky frame

types.name: flying
types.morph_traits: feathered wings replacing front limbs or on back, hollow light bones, sky blue and white color palette, streamlined body

types.name: psychic
types.morph_traits: glowing third eye on forehead, pink and lavender color palette, ethereal aura, enlarged smooth cranium

types.name: bug
types.morph_traits: chitinous exoskeleton plating, compound eyes, antenna on head, green and brown color palette, segmented limbs

types.name: rock
types.morph_traits: stone-encrusted shell or plating, grey and brown color palette, angular blocky features, crystal mineral growths

types.name: ghost
types.morph_traits: translucent wispy body edges, hollow black eye sockets, purple and black color palette, shadowy vapour trailing from tail

types.name: dragon
types.morph_traits: small wing membranes on back, horn or crest on head, scaled body, deep blue and purple color palette, slit pupils

types.name: dark
types.morph_traits: shadowy dark fur, black and dark grey color palette, jagged spiky edges, menacing narrow eyes, tattered ear tips

types.name: steel
types.morph_traits: metallic plated armour on torso and limbs, silver and gunmetal color palette, mechanical joint lines, reflective smooth surfaces

types.name: fairy
types.morph_traits: small ornate wings, pastel pink and white color palette, glowing sparkles around body, round soft features, flower or star motifs
